Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You're right... I just wanted to forget.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}That's why I left everyone behind, and tried to use the drugs to suppress my power...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But, nothing I did could erase the memory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}No matter what I do, I always end up back here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It's my fault. This is what I deserve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But I gotta give you a warning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You take my life, and you're gonna end up just like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}What, are you begging for your life?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Even if all you have now is hatred, one day you'll regret it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}These are not his sins to bear...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Is it not permissible to kill those who are themselves killers?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Losing one of our own has posed a slight challenge for us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But, we cannot simply turn a blind eye to all the trouble you've caused.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Fear not. This life is but a stepping stone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I shall deliver unto you both... salvation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Ohhh, but that's right! Whether or not to this boy's revenge, you are fated to die, regardless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}You've been taking those suppressants for some time now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Listen to your body... The signs have already begun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}You're just going to die... no matter what!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}This is all I've been living for... What was even the point then!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}The cause of death is hardly of importance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Besides, the breath of life is faint in you as well, child.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}...You were planning to join him once the deed was done, were you not?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}This may be a bit ill-timed, but no matter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}It matters not whose life I take first. You're both destined to perish anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Now then, with what life you have left, answer me this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}There is a navigator in your ranks, similar to Chidori, is there not?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}You've been killing the Shadows we wish to protect with startling efficiency, before we can even arrive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}If you don't expedite your answer, then this will hurt you more than it hurts me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}That's the only reason they let me join, even though I'm a kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}It doesn't matter now... I'll never have my revenge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}I don't have any reason to live... What's the point in fighting anymore...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}What a beautiful end to your life...[n]{f 1 1}
